title: Gear Fifth Awakens
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Yamato, Wano Citizens, Nami, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Decisive battle in the skies of wano...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHATA A A A A A A A A AVAAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are Kaido and his minions up to something?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Worry not!! Everything is under control!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's he doing here?! This is our one day to be free!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not be alarmed, I am not Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In fact, that eruption was the final send off..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...For the Supreme Commander of the Beast Pirates!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
